FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
null/missing
OUD_ANY_COMBINED Overarching OUD Disorder (Any of the 3 Sub-Indicators) - Combined Claims NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering both Medicare and Medicaid data, for having Overarching opioid use disorder (any positive result from the three indicators: DX or procedure, hospital or ED, or MAT) Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims
